case_title: ROSARIO PABLO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-18-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PABLO, ROSARIO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-18-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-18-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-03-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PABLO, ROSARIO SERVED MAY-14-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT ONLY COUNT ONE (NEGLIGENCE), COUNT TWO (WILLFUL FAILURE TO WARN) OF FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION
OBJECTION TO HEARING BY COMMISSIONER/PRO TEM ACTING AS JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
